name: tm-norge
description: Operator preset preserving the historical tm-norge/Quick3/Cloudflare/Teams gates as data.

rules.failure_signal: Work selection and closeout can drift when repo-local routing is not re-read.
rules.gate: Before choosing or closing work, read repo instructions, local skill inventory, and the backlog/source-of-truth files named by the current checkout.

rules.failure_signal: Completion claims are weak unless validation output is current and quoted.
rules.gate: Before claiming completion, run the discovered validation commands or mark each skipped command as needs_verification with the exact command.

rules.failure_signal: External state can drift from repo state and transcript memory.
rules.gate: Before recommending action based on runtime or tenant state, run a non-destructive live check and quote one non-secret output line.

rules.failure_signal: Implementation can expand beyond the requested packet or do-not-build boundary.
rules.gate: Before editing, restate the active scope and do-not-build boundary; move overflow into needs_verification or backlog instead of implementing it.

rules.failure_signal: Quick3 write flows are unsafe without same-run smoke and readback evidence.
rules.gate: Before any Quick3 append or mutate recommendation, require same-run smoke plus readback and quote the non-secret confirmation.

rules.failure_signal: Cloudflare config and deployed runtime can diverge.
rules.gate: Before claiming Cloudflare deploy/config health, inspect the current config and run the repo-approved live or deploy verification command.

rules.failure_signal: Teams/M365 advice is brittle without live tenant inspection.
rules.gate: Before proposing Teams/M365 operations, inspect the live tenant or connector state and include the non-secret evidence used.

rules.failure_signal: Release actions need current validation and explicit dirty-state boundaries.
rules.gate: Before commit, push, merge, or ship, run validation or document skips, inspect git status, and state exactly which files are in scope.

rules.failure_signal: Transcript-derived memory can be useful but stale.
rules.gate: Before continuing prior agent work, read the latest approved learning report and verify any memory-derived claim against current repo or runtime evidence.
